name: REPUBLIC AIRWAYS HOLDINGS INC.
business: Republic Airways Holdings Inc. is the second largest independent regional airline in the United States, operating 275 regional jet aircraft that provide scheduled passenger service to approximately 130 cities under capacity purchase agreements with American Airlines, Delta Air Lines, and United Airlines.
sellsTo: Partner Airlines (American Airlines, Delta Air Lines, United Airlines)
Passengers traveling under American Eagle, Delta Connection, or United Express brands

exposures.sentence: Additionally, we have a strategic partnership with EVE for the development of electric vertical takeoff and landing (eVTOL) aircraft.

catalysts.event: Delivery of three Embraer E175 regional jets
catalysts.sentence: Republic has an order for 29 Embraer regional jets (E175), and expects three aircraft to be delivered during the three months ended March 31, 2026

catalysts.event: Delivery of 26 Embraer E175 regional jets
catalysts.sentence: with the remaining 26 aircraft deliveries beginning in 2027 through 2029.

catalysts.event: Completion of second phase of Aviation Campus including new corporate headquarters
catalysts.sentence: In January 2026, the second phase of the Aviation Campus was completed, including a new corporate headquarters.

catalysts.event: CEO succession: Matthew Koscal to succeed David Grizzle as CEO
catalysts.sentence: the Board of Directors expects that Mr. Koscal will succeed Mr. Grizzle in the position of CEO during the year ending December 31, 2026.

tamClaims.claim: 32% of all scheduled airline flights in the United States in 2024 were performed by regional airlines, and approximately 134 million passengers were carried on those flights.
tamClaims.sentence: According to the Regional Airline Association (RAA), 32% of all scheduled airline flights in the United States in 2024 were performed by regional airlines, and approximately 134 million passengers were carried on those flights.

tamClaims.claim: 64% of U.S. airports with scheduled passenger service are served exclusively by regional airlines.
tamClaims.sentence: Of the U.S. airports with scheduled passenger service, 64% are served exclusively by regional airlines.
